name: The Bookman
short_description: A reporter uncovers the story, revealing that the hospital staff have fallen victim to a mysterious creature whose face is made of book pages. Traveling through various locations of the hospital, the player will collect clues and solve puzzles to uncover the truth.
detailed_description:
One reporter uncovers the story, revealing that the hospital staff have fallen victim to a mysterious creature whose face is made of book pages.

The player must learn the history of this monster by investigating the hospital's past and uncovering the dark secrets surrounding its origins. Traveling through the hospital's various locations, the player must collect clues, solve puzzles, and interact with characters to uncover the truth and find a way to stop the horrific creature.
Average time to complete Early Access version: 30 minutes
